steps.title: Portal design-token source resolved
steps.action: adopt runtime-delivered resolved PortalPartTokens as the live source when the handshake exposes them; else keep the local mirror
steps.expected_visual: portal renders the runtime's active-profile look

steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Portal size resolved
steps.action: scale portal defaults from live scene dimensions unless explicit size overrides were provided
steps.expected_visual: portal occupies a readable portion of the detected display

steps.title: Window management sequence
steps.action: move portal → boundary clamp → minimize → restore → return to origin
steps.expected_visual: portal moves cleanly; minimize icon appears; restore brings full portal back

steps.title: Portal moved to centre
steps.expected_visual: portal repositioned to centre of scene; chrome intact

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal moved cleanly to scene centre with chrome intact

steps.title: Boundary clamp verified
steps.expected_visual: portal visible at bottom-right edge; not partially offscreen

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: out-of-bounds move clamped to scene edge; portal stays fully on-screen

steps.title: Portal minimized
steps.action: portal tiles hidden; minimized icon rendered at current position
steps.expected_visual: circular icon visible; full portal surface hidden

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: full portal surface hidden; only the minimized icon remains visible

steps.title: Portal restored to origin
steps.expected_visual: full portal visible at origin position; icon gone; chrome intact

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: restore brought the full portal back at its origin; minimized icon gone; chrome intact

steps.title: Text Stream Portal scenario complete
steps.action: review transcript and capture UX notes
steps.expected_visual: portal visible until cleanup releases the lease

steps.title: Portal lease released
steps.action: release the lease before closing the session
steps.expected_visual: all portal tiles are removed from the HUD
